charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1101_010:
Sabrina asked [Name:PlayerNickname ]
to reach out to some Trainers who enjoy
Pokémon battles.
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_030:
Thank you, all. That was a valuable
experience.
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_040: Of course! And right back at ya!
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_050: You’re welcome to battle with us anytime!
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_060:
But...I thought you didn’t much care for
battling, Sabrina.
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_080:
But now that I’ve awakened my arc suit,
I want a battle that’ll satisfy Alakazam.
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_090:
So I had [Name:PlayerNickname ]
introduce me to you two.
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_110:
Do you like Pokémon battles because you
enjoy winning?
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_120: Hmm... Well, winning is nice, but...
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_130: I think the battles themselves are fun!
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_140:
Yeah! For me, battles where you truly
connect with your Pokémon or opponent
are the best!
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_150:
I see. So you enjoy battling because it brings
you closer to your Pokémon.
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_160:
Alakazam and I have always been deeply
connected, to the extent we share senses.
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_170:
Our minds are linked, with no need for
words. I feel it whenever we battle.
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_180:
I think awakening my arc suit has heightened
that sense of unity.
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_190:
Wow... Sensing your Pokémon’s feelings so
strongly...
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_0401_220: No... I don’t think we’re special.
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_0401_230:
Anyone should be able to feel one with
their Pokémon.
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_0402_250:
Is it? Everyone should be able to feel one
with their Pokémon.
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_0402_260:
I don’t think it’s because Alakazam and I are
psychic or anything.
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_270:
What’s important is a strong connection with
your Pokémon.
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_280: And an effective way to achieve that is...
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_300:
Yeah! If we wanna grow closer to our
partner Pokémon and friends, we’ve gotta
battle!
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_310:
*giggle* You two REALLY enjoy battling,
don’t you.
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_320:
All right, [Name:PlayerNickname ] and
Alakazam. Shall we battle them a while
longer?
charaepi_ch0114_90_natsume/2301_1201_330:
To forge deeper connections and learn what
makes battling fun...of course.
